top_signals.title: Asian Stocks, Bonds Poised to Fall on Hawkish Fed: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks and bonds looked set to track US losses after the Federal Reserve signaled rates may need to rise further to contain inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: What lies behind the new boom in Colombian cocaine
top_signals.summary: Leftwing rebels have been replaced by gangsters selling ever more drugs to Europe and Asia
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Furetank VINGA Series Tanker to be Named
